highlights.description: Initial release with 18 OpenClaw-compatible markdown skills

added.description: `pack.SkillPack` implementation for embedding skills via go:embed
Core skills: github, tmux, weather, coding-agent
Utility skills: notion, slack, trello, gh-issues, summarize, openai-whisper-api, xurl, healthcheck, blogwatcher, gemini
Meta skills: session-logs, oracle, skill-creator, goplaces

documentation.description: README with usage examples and skill list
